user.title: DroneMobile V2
user.description: Connect your DroneMobile / Compustar / Firstech vehicle.

data.force_command: Force commands (send even if state already matches)

error.cannot_connect: Cannot connect to DroneMobile. Check your internet connection.
error.no_devices: No vehicles found on this account.
error.unknown: Unexpected error. Check the Home Assistant logs for details.

abort.already_configured: This DroneMobile account is already configured.

data_description.update_interval: How often to poll the DroneMobile API (1–60 minutes). Lower values increase battery drain on the vehicle.
data_description.force_command: Send commands even if the current state already matches (e.g. lock when already locked).
